title: Donald Trump pushes delay in Stormy Daniels hush money sentencing
shortDescription: The GOP presidential nominee asked a New York judge to delay sentencing in his hush money conviction until after the election.

title: Is Arizona an ‘emerging problem’ for Donald Trump?
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump is considering visiting U.S.-Mexico border as polls show him losing ground to Vice President Kamala Harris in Arizona.

title: Trump suggests 20% tariffs, double the already-controversial proposal
shortDescription: While campaigning in North Carolina, Donald Trump suggested he could impose widespread tariffs up to 20%. Experts say high tariffs stunt economy.

title: NJ governor picks former aide to fill Bob Menendez's Senate seat
shortDescription: Gov. Phil Murphy is expected to send his former chief of staff, George Helmy, to fill Sen. Bob Menendez's U.S. Senate seat.

title: Harris leads Trump in 5 battleground states, poll finds | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: Columbia University President Minouche Shafik has resigned. How a housing voucher program is failing poor families. It's all on The Excerpt.

title: Biden administration says Medicare negotiated price discounts on 10 prescription drugs
shortDescription: The Biden administration said Medicare negotiated discounts with pharmaceutical companies on 10 drugs prescribed to treat cancer and heart disease.

title: Trump zeroes in on inflation at swing state campaign stop as Harris gains ground
shortDescription: Donald Trump focused on an issue that Republicans are hoping will win them support – inflation and the nation's economy – as Kamala Harris has gained some ground.

title: Lara Trump didn't say she'd sing Celine Dion song herself | Fact check
shortDescription: Lara Trump did not say the quote in question. The quote originated on a satirical social media account.

title: 'Evangelicals for Harris' attempts to court religious voters Wednesday night
shortDescription: Since launching her campaign in July, VP Kamala Harris has received eye popping donations collected through identity-based organizing calls.

title: DNC speaker lineup includes Biden, Obama, Clintons
shortDescription: President Joe Biden and former Presidents Barack Obama and Bill Clinton will speak at the 2024 Democratic National Convention.

title: Mechanical issue, not debt, caused Trump to divert | Fact check
shortDescription: A Bozeman Yellowstone International Airport spokesperson said Trump doesn't owe the airport any money. A mechanical issue caused the diversion.

title: No, Biden, Walz are not trying to let noncitizens vote | Fact check
shortDescription: Noncitizens cannot vote in federal elections. Laws Tim Walz signed as Minnesota's governor and a bill President Joe Biden opposes won't change that.

title: What we know about celeb election endorsements
shortDescription: Both political parties have welcomed celebrity endorsements, but do they have an impact on voters? Here's what we know now.

title: Trump returns to Asheville. Is North Carolina a swing state?
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump is returning to Asheville, North Carolina for a rally Wednesday, continuing a string of appearances in red states.

title: Complaint argues Trump-Musk interview violated campaign finance laws
shortDescription: End Citizens United alleges Elon Musk’s use of company resources to resolve a tech glitch amounted to an illegal corporate campaign contribution.

title: Harris erases Trump's leads in key battleground states, new poll says
shortDescription: Kamala Harris is ahead or tied with Donald Trump in six of seven battleground states, according to a new survey by the Cook Political Report.

title: Donald Trump attacks Harris and Walz at Bozeman rally
shortDescription: Donald Trump criticized Vice President Kamala Harris over a perceived lack of press conferences and Gov. Tim Walz over his school bathroom policies in Minnesota.
